chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl No.822 of 2024 03.06.2024 Mr. Muhammad Rafique Brohi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Addl. P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Sanaullah Brohi @ Sana is seeking post arrest bail in Crime No.229/2022 U/s 324, 34 PPC registered at P.S. Gulshan-e-Maymar, Karachi. 2. As per FIR registered on 02.05.2022 by one Abdul Sattar, the applicant and two other accused armed with rifle and pistols burst into hotel of complainant and started incriminating firing over the people present therein but no one got injured. Complainant party caught hold of applicant in the scuffle but then he with the help of his accomplices made his escape good. He was arrested on 14.02.2024 and since then he is in jail. Except ineffective firing and recovery of one rifle allegedly held by the applicant, nothing prima facie is available to show involvement of the applicant in the case. 3. Learned Addl. P.G has recorded no objection to grant of bail to the applicant. 4. Accordingly, in view of above, this application is allowed and applicant is granted bail subject to furnishing his solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial court. Needless to mention that the observations made herein above are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. The bail applications are disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E A.K
